source_archive.requirement_set: Residential building permit application intake requirements
source_archive.archive_scope: fixture-only normalized requirement set for deterministic guardrail validation

requirements.text: A residential building permit application package must identify the project address, applicant contact, scope of work, and permit type before intake review.

obligations.must: provide project address, applicant contact, scope of work, and permit type

stop_gates.trigger: missing project address, applicant contact, scope of work, or permit type
stop_gates.effect: do not submit or certify the application package

reversible_actions.reversal: discard or revise draft before submission

exact_confirmations.phrase: I confirm the residential permit application package is complete and ready for manual submission review.
exact_confirmations.required_before: any submission, certification, payment, upload, or cancellation step
